info.name: backend-sai-family API
info.description: Manual API tests for the local Sai Family backend Docker stack.

item.name: POST /accounts - Create devotee account with profile image
item.description: Validation: profileImage is required (jpg/png/webp, <=5MB). name min 2, email valid, mobileNumber 8-15 chars, completeAddress min 10, pincode 4-10 digits, occupation min 2. Optional expoPushToken must match Expo token format.

formdata.value: Sai Residency, MG Road, Pune, Maharashtra

exec: throw new Error("authorId is not set. Run POST /accounts first (Create devotee account) to populate authorId.");

formdata.value: Sai Baba helped our family during a difficult time. Sharing this leela with gratitude.

exec: if (!authorId) throw new Error("authorId is not set. Run POST /accounts first.");

item.name: GET /api/admin/directory/reviews
item.description: Admin review moderation queue. Query: status, rating, listingId, q, limit, offset.

exec: pm.test("Admin reviews response ok", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: GET /api/admin/directory/analytics
item.description: Admin Directory dashboard metrics. Query: days, default 30.

item.name: GET /api/admin/directory/audit-logs
item.description: Admin Directory audit trail. Query: actorId, entity, entityId, action, limit, offset.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/categories
item.description: Admin creates a Directory category. Body: name required; optional slug, description, icon, iconFamily, color, sortOrder, isActive.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Admin Test Category",
  "slug": "admin-test-category",
  "description": "Temporary category for admin testing.",
  "icon": "briefcase-business",
  "iconFamily": "lucide",
  "color": "#B86B00",
  "sortOrder": 999,
  "isActive": true
}

item.name: PATCH /api/admin/directory/categories/:id
item.description: Admin updates a Directory category. Partial JSON body allowed.

item.name: DELETE /api/admin/directory/categories/:id
item.description: Admin deactivates a Directory category. This is a soft delete: isActive becomes false, preserving listings/drafts references.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/reviews/:id/approve
item.description: Admin publishes/approves a Directory review.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/reviews/:id/reject
item.description: Admin rejects a Directory review.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/reviews/:id/hide
item.description: Admin hides a Directory review.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/reviews/:id/restore
item.description: Admin restores a Directory review back to published.

item.name: GET /api/admin/directory/reports
item.description: Admin listing report queue. Query: status=pending|resolved|dismissed, reason, listingId, limit, offset.

exec: pm.test("Admin reports response ok", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/reports/:id/resolve
item.description: Admin resolves or dismisses a Directory listing report. status must be resolved or dismissed.

item.name: GET /api/admin/directory/listings
item.description: Admin Directory listing moderation queue. Filters: status, verificationStatus, categoryId, q, city, limit, offset.

exec: pm.test("Admin directory listings response ok", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/listings/:id/approve
item.description: Admin approves a pending Directory listing and publishes it.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/listings/:id/reject
item.description: Admin rejects a Directory listing.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/listings/:id/suspend
item.description: Admin suspends a published Directory listing.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/listings/:id/restore
item.description: Admin restores listing to pending_review.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/listings/:id/verify
item.description: Admin updates Directory listing verification status, usually to verified.

item.name: POST /api/admin/directory/listings/:id/unverify
item.description: Admin removes Directory listing verification.

item.name: GET /api/events/home - Home Sections
item.description: Events hub aggregate API. Returns sections.happeningToday, thisWeek, thisMonth, comingSoon, trendingSections.today/thisWeek/thisMonth/comingSoon, eventTypeGuide, trendingThisWeek, topOrganisers, weeklySchedule, and stats. Optional query: lat, lng, radius, timezone, dateFrom, dateTo, limit.

item.name: GET /api/events/nearby - Nearby Events
item.description: Nearby map/list API. Required query: lat, lng. Optional: radius, type, limit. Returns events with distanceKm and center.

item.name: GET /api/events/recommendations - Recommended Events
item.description: Recommended events using initial type + popularity + optional distance heuristics. Optional x-user-id improves recommendations from RSVP history.

item.name: POST /api/events/suggestions/title
item.description: Template-based title suggestions for the Create Event form. No external AI dependency yet.

item.name: GET /api/places/search
item.description: Local-safe venue search. Uses local fixture places plus previously used event venues. Optional query: city, limit.

item.name: POST /api/events/drafts - Create Draft
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Frontend Phase 1 flow: upload banner first with POST /api/media/upload, then autosave draft metadata here as JSON with bannerUrl. Backend also supports multipart later if frontend moves to one-request upload.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Weekly Sai Bhajan Draft",
  "description": "Draft for weekly bhajan gathering.",
  "type": "bhajan",
  "startAt": "2026-06-20T13:30:00.000Z",
  "endAt": "2026-06-20T15:00:00.000Z",
  "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
  "venueName": "Sai Mandir Hall",
  "address": "MG Road, Pune, Maharashtra",
  "city": "Pune",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "country": "India",
  "latitude": 18.5204,
  "longitude": 73.8567,
  "bannerUrl": "{{uploadedMediaUrl}}",
  "recurrence": {
    "frequency": "weekly",
    "interval": 1,
    "count": 3
  }
}

item.name: PATCH /api/events/drafts/:id - Update Draft
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Frontend Phase 1 flow sends JSON metadata updates. If banner changed, upload it first with POST /api/media/upload and pass the returned URL as bannerUrl.

item.name: POST /api/events/drafts/:id/publish
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Publishes a draft. If recurrence exists, creates generated event occurrences and returns series plus events.

item.name: POST /api/events - Create Event
item.description: Validation: title min 3, description min 10, address min 5, latitude -90..90, longitude -180..180, startAt/endAt required and endAt >= startAt. Optional type enum: bhajan|pooja|seva|medical|satsang|darshan|general. Requires x-user-id. Frontend Phase 1 flow: upload banner first with POST /api/media/upload, then create event here as JSON with bannerUrl. Backend also supports multipart later if frontend moves to one-request upload.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Thursday Sai Bhajan",
  "description": "Weekly satsang and aarti for all devotees.",
  "type": "bhajan",
  "startAt": "2026-06-15T13:30:00.000Z",
  "endAt": "2026-06-15T15:00:00.000Z",
  "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
  "venueName": "Sai Mandir Hall",
  "address": "MG Road, Pune, Maharashtra",
  "city": "Pune",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "country": "India",
  "latitude": 18.5204,
  "longitude": 73.8567,
  "bannerUrl": "{{uploadedMediaUrl}}"
}

item.name: GET /api/events/:id/reviews
item.description: Returns event reviews with average rating summary. Public read.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/reviews
item.description: Requires x-user-id. One review per user per event. User must have RSVP status going.

item.name: GET /api/events/:id/photos
item.description: Returns event photo gallery. Public read.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/photos
item.description: Requires x-user-id and multipart/form-data. Event must be completed. Organizer/admin or RSVP attendee can upload. Accepted file keys: photo, photos, file, files. Images only: JPG, PNG, WEBP.

item.name: GET /api/events/:id/attendees - Organizer Attendees
item.description: Owner/admin only. Returns RSVP attendees with status, guestCount, reminderMinutesBefore, checkedInAt, and summary totals. Optional query: status=going|cancelled, checkedIn=true|false, limit, offset.

item.name: GET /api/events/:id/analytics - Organizer Analytics
item.description: Owner/admin only. Returns lightweight organizer metrics: views, shares, bookmarks, comments, RSVPs, guestCount, checkIns, recent 7-day activity, and conversion rates.

item.name: PATCH /api/events/:id - Update Event
item.description: Validation: at least one field required. If provided, title min 3, description min 10, address min 5, lat/lng range checks. endAt must not be before startAt. Only owner/admin can update. Requires x-user-id. Frontend Phase 1 flow sends JSON metadata. If banner changed, upload it first with POST /api/media/upload and pass the returned URL as bannerUrl.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/bookmark
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Saves the event to the current user's bookmarks. Idempotent. Response includes updated bookmark count and bookmarkedByMe=true.

item.name: DELETE /api/events/:id/bookmark
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Removes the event from the current user's bookmarks. Idempotent. Response includes updated bookmark count and bookmarkedByMe=false.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/rsvp
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Event must exist and be published. Optional JSON body: {"status":"going","guestCount":0,"reminderMinutesBefore":30}. `guests` is still accepted for compatibility. Response includes { event, rsvp } with guestCount and reminderMinutesBefore.

item.name: DELETE /api/events/:id/rsvp
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Response includes { event: { id, rsvps, rsvpedByMe:false }, eventId, rsvped:false, _count }.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/check-in - Organizer Check In
item.description: Owner/admin only. Checks in an RSVP attendee. Body userId defaults to current x-user-id if omitted, but organizers normally pass the attendee userId.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/report - Organizer Event Report
item.description: Owner/admin only. Event must be completed. Creates an after-event report with reason and optional details.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/share - Track Share
item.description: Tracks a share action for analytics. x-user-id is optional. channel can be whatsapp, copy_link, instagram, etc.

item.name: GET /api/users/me/event-bookmarks
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Returns event bookmarks sorted newest first. Response includes bookmarks[] with event and events[] compatibility array.

item.name: GET /api/users/me/calendar/preferences
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Returns or creates default calendar preferences.

item.name: PATCH /api/users/me/calendar/preferences
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Updates calendar preferences used by the mobile calendar and ICS feed.

item.name: GET /api/users/me/calendar.ics
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Downloads an ICS calendar containing future RSVP, created, and bookmarked events according to calendar preferences.

item.name: GET /api/events/calendar?month=YYYY-MM
item.description: Returns { month, days, calendar, summary }. summary includes totalEvents, activeDays, attending, and byType counts.

item.name: GET /api/community-calendars
item.description: Lists active community calendars. Optional x-user-id marks subscribedByMe. Optional query: city, type.

item.name: POST /api/community-calendars/:id/subscribe
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Subscribes current user to a community calendar. Run GET /api/community-calendars first to populate communityCalendarId.

item.name: DELETE /api/community-calendars/:id/subscribe
item.description: Requires x-user-id. Unsubscribes current user from a community calendar.

item.name: POST /api/events/:id/comments
item.description: Validation: content required, min 1 and max 1000 chars. Requires x-user-id.

item.name: POST /api/media/upload - Event Banner
item.description: Supports single file key `file` OR multiple key `files` (up to 10). Allowed MIME: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, video/mp4, video/quicktime, audio/mpeg, audio/mp4, audio/wav, audio/webm. Max 150MB per file. Requires x-user-id. Response includes media[] with mimeType and a top-level url for the first uploaded file.

item.name: POST /api/notifications/event-reminder (Admin)
item.description: Admin only (x-user-id must be mandir_admin/super_admin). Body can be {"eventId":"..."} or {"daysAhead":30}.

item.name: POST /api/notifications/directory-listing-status (Admin)
item.description: Admin only. Manually trigger a Directory listing owner notification. status enum: submitted, approved, rejected, verified, suspended, report_resolved.

item.name: DELETE /api/events/:id - Cancel Event
item.description: Owner/admin only. Soft cancels the event. Response: {"success":true,"id":"...","status":"cancelled"}.

item.name: GET /api/directory/categories
item.description: List active Directory categories. Optional includeCounts=true.

item.name: GET /api/directory/home - Directory Home
item.description: Directory home aggregation for frontend home screen. Query: city, lat, lng, limit. Returns categories, featuredListings, nearbyListings, popularCategories, trendingListings, and stats.

item.name: GET /api/directory/search - Search Listings
item.description: Search published Directory listings. Query: q required; optional categoryId, city, lat, lng, radiusKm, limit, offset. Returns results/listings, suggestions, and pagination.

item.name: GET /api/directory/search/suggestions - Search Suggestions
item.description: Autocomplete suggestions for listings, categories, and tags. Query: q required; optional limit.

item.name: GET /api/users/me/directory/recent-searches
item.description: Authenticated user recent Directory searches. Header: x-user-id required. Query: limit optional.

item.name: POST /api/users/me/directory/recent-searches
item.description: Save or refresh a recent Directory search for the authenticated user. Body: query required; optional city, categoryId.

item.name: DELETE /api/users/me/directory/recent-searches
item.description: Clear authenticated user's Directory recent searches.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/report
item.description: Authenticated user reports a published business listing. Owner cannot report own listing. reason enum: spam, inappropriate, scam, duplicate, wrong_info, other. details optional min 5 max 1000.

item.name: GET /api/directory/listings
item.description: Public Directory listing discovery. Supports q/category/city/location/radius/sort/pagination filters.

exec: pm.test("Directory listings response ok", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: GET /api/directory/listings/:id
item.description: Directory listing detail with reviewSummary, recentReviews, similarListings, gallery, owner and current-user flags.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings
item.description: Create Directory listing as pending_review. JSON metadata; upload images first via /api/media/upload and pass logoUrl/bannerUrl/galleryUrls.

body.raw:
{
  "businessName": "Sai Family Test Service",
  "categoryId": "directory_category_education",
  "tagline": "Trusted service from Sai community",
  "description": "This is a test business listing created from Postman for Sai Directory testing.",
  "yearsOfExperience": 5,
  "homeServiceAvailable": true,
  "communityRecommendationEnabled": true,
  "phoneNumber": "+919876543210",
  "whatsappNumber": "+919876543210",
  "email": "directory-test@example.com",
  "websiteUrl": "https://example.com",
  "address": "MG Road, Pune",
  "city": "Pune",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "country": "India",
  "pincode": "411001",
  "latitude": 18.5204,
  "longitude": 73.8567,
  "specialties": ["Tutoring"],
  "tags": ["education", "service"],
  "serviceAreas": ["Pune"],
  "bannerUrl": "{{directoryUploadedMediaUrl}}",
  "galleryUrls": []
}

item.name: PATCH /api/directory/listings/:id
item.description: Update own Directory listing. Owner/admin only. Partial JSON body.

item.name: DELETE /api/directory/listings/:id
item.description: Archive own Directory listing. Owner/admin only.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listing-drafts
item.description: Create partial Directory listing draft.

item.name: PATCH /api/directory/listing-drafts/:id
item.description: Update partial Directory listing draft.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listing-drafts/:id/publish
item.description: Publish Directory draft into pending_review listing after full validation.

item.name: GET /api/users/me/directory/listings
item.description: My Directory listings dashboard.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/bookmark
item.description: Bookmark listing.

item.name: DELETE /api/directory/listings/:id/bookmark
item.description: Remove listing bookmark.

item.name: GET /api/users/me/directory/bookmarks
item.description: My bookmarked Directory listings.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/recommend
item.description: Recommend listing. Owner cannot recommend own listing.

item.name: DELETE /api/directory/listings/:id/recommend
item.description: Remove recommendation.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/contact
item.description: Create contact/enquiry record. Rate limited.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/share
item.description: Track listing share.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/view
item.description: Track listing view.

item.name: GET /api/directory/listings/:id/reviews
item.description: List listing reviews with summary.

item.name: POST /api/directory/listings/:id/reviews
item.description: Create review after contact/enquiry. Rate limited.

item.name: PATCH /api/directory/reviews/:id
item.description: Update own review.

item.name: DELETE /api/directory/reviews/:id
item.description: Soft delete/hide own review.

item.name: POST /api/directory/reviews/:id/vote
item.description: Vote helpful/not_helpful on review.

item.name: DELETE /api/directory/reviews/:id/vote
item.description: Remove my review vote.
